subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto the handmaidens of God who have believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that they may through the mention of God be severed from all else but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری اماء الله اللائی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لینقطعن بذکر الله عما سواه و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
